project.name: Velox
project.description: Self-hosted media server like Jellyfin/Emby but lighter. Go backend + React frontend.

tooling.frontend_linter: ESLint flat config (TS + React Hooks + React Refresh)

database_schema.summary: 22 tables across 11 migrations. Media server stores: libraries, movies/episodes (logical), video files (physical), series/seasons, genres, people/credits, subtitles, audio tracks, users, watch progress, favorites, sessions.
key_patterns: Logical vs Physical: media (content) ↔ media_files (file on disk)
Series chain: series → seasons → episodes → media → media_files
Unified user_data: progress + favorites + rating in 1 table (Emby pattern)
XOR polymorphic: media_genres/credits CHECK exactly one of media_id/series_id
Provider IDs: tmdb_id + imdb_id indexed directly, external_ids table for others

layers: WithTx() on repos for transaction-scoped operations
respondJSON wraps success in {"data": ...}, logs encode errors
architecture.playback_strategy: Direct Play first → Direct Stream (remux) → Transcode Audio → Full Transcode
architecture.auth: JWT (15min access + 7-day refresh), bcrypt cost 12, first-run setup wizard
architecture.metadata: TMDb primary, NFO/local files override, external_ids for TVDB/AniDB/etc

conventions.language: Vietnamese in plans, English in code/commits
